calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant: Mark Sussman is present
Respondent(s)/Plaintiff(s): Francis McNerney & Kellie McNerney are present

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Mark Sussman, Appellant/Defendant testifies on his own behalf

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1: Copy of Quit Claim Deed
Exhibit 2: Copy of Letter and email from Laurie Miller.

Francis McNerney, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf
Kellie McNerney, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on her own behalf

The following documentary evidence is introduced
Exhibit A: Copy of Quick Claim
Exhibit B: Copies of emails
exhibit C: Copy of demand letter
Exhibit D: Request for payments to court on Judgment
Exhibit E: Redacted account statements
Exhibit F: Copy blank affidavit of execution and delivery deed (2 copies)
Exhibit G: Copy of email dated May 12, 2017
exhibit J: Copy of emails between Respondents and Appellant
Exhibit H: Copy of emails dated 5-12-17 from Connie Schlabach
Exhibit I: Copy of emails dated June 23, 2016
Rxhibit J: Copy of emails dated Jul24, 2017
Exhibit K: Copy of email re: Quit Claim dated November 28, 2016
Exibit L: Email re: correcting quit Claim errors dated November 11, 2017

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Judgment Entered
